lexical_signals.purpose: Writing/speaking linking devices, collocations and discourse signals for transparent scoring evidence.

cefr_vocabulary.purpose: CEFR vocabulary baseline for lexical range analysis and fallback classification.

grammar_patterns.purpose: CEFR-aligned deterministic grammar range patterns for transparent syntax evidence.

open_language_profiles.purpose: Vendored CEFR-J/Open Language Profiles CSV snapshots imported by linguistics:sync.

golden_probes.purpose: VSTEP writing samples used by linguistics:probe to detect missing reference signals.
